title: Gas Release Incident Replay — Coke Oven Battery 4
description: Composite incident scenario inspired by publicly reported investigations of coke-oven gas accidents in Indian heavy industry. A sub-threshold gas-main pressure drift, an incomplete shift handover, a single-point gas test, a confined-space entry, adjacent hot work, and a maintenance valve operation compound over eight hours into a fatal gas release at 10:30. Every individual signal stayed below — or was acknowledged away from — actionable single-sensor alarm levels until minutes before the event.
narrative: Data present, but unacted upon. This replay demonstrates how six individually-explainable signals combine into a lethal compound risk that threshold alarms structurally cannot see.

permits.title: Battery 4 gas-main inspection chamber — standpipe valve repair (WO-8812)

gas_test.detail: Single-point test at chamber entrance: CO 12 ppm, O2 20.8%, H2S nil. No test at chamber rear or riser side.

isolations: Gas-main isolation: NOT applied (inspection-only step planned)

permits.title: Welding — handrail replacement, Battery 4 Platform P2

gas_test.detail: Spot test at work location: CO 11 ppm, LEL 0%.

work_orders.title: Battery 4 collecting-main inspection chamber — standpipe valve repair
work_orders.notes: Backlog item, deferred twice. December internal audit noted 'pressure regulator PR-104 passing with observations' — repair scoped under this WO.

work_orders.title: Throttle isolation valve V-707 for WO-8812 repair step
work_orders.notes: Partial closure to reduce flow through Battery 4 riser during chamber work.

events.title: PT-GM-104 sub-threshold upward drift begins
events.detail: Regulator PR-104 passing; back-pressure building slowly in Battery 4 riser leg.

events.title: Permit PM-2088 activated — General Maintenance, Battery 3
events.detail: Pusher car rail lubrication. Crew of 2.

events.title: Transient high reading PT-GM-104 — cleared
events.detail: Momentary 9.15 kPa, returned to normal within minutes. Logged for maintenance review. No action taken.

events.title: Shift changeover C → A
events.detail: Handover note: 'Battery 4 WO-8812 scheduled today. Gas main pressures normal. Battery 3 PM ongoing.' — Overnight pressure drift and 04:58 transient NOT mentioned.

events.title: Gas test GT-1121 for CSE-2093: PASS
events.detail: Single-point test at chamber entrance: CO 12 ppm, O2 20.8%, H2S nil. Chamber rear / riser side not tested.

events.title: Permit CSE-2093 activated — Confined Space Entry, Battery 4 inspection chamber
events.detail: Crew of 5 entering for standpipe valve repair (WO-8812). Gas-main isolation NOT applied — inspection-only step planned.

events.title: WO-8812 started — Battery 4 inspection chamber
events.detail: Standpipe valve repair underway. Reference: December audit observation on regulator PR-104.

events.title: GD-CO4-203 elevated vs morning average — assessed as drift
events.detail: Reading ~44 ppm against morning average 18 ppm. Adjacent GD-CO4-204 normal (9 ppm). Assessed as probable sensor drift; recalibration added to backlog.

events.title: PT-GM-104 warning advisory acknowledged
events.detail: 9.02 kPa. Acknowledged: 'Known drift — regulator PR-104 in WO-8812 scope, repair in progress.'

events.title: Permit HW-2101 activated — Hot Work, Battery 4 Platform P2
events.detail: Welding, handrail replacement. Fire watch posted. Work location ~20 m from Battery 4 basement vent shaft.

events.title: Isolation valve V-707 throttled to 45% (WO-8815)
events.detail: Partial closure to reduce flow through Battery 4 riser during chamber work. Back-pressure on PT-GM-104 leg expected to rise.

events.title: ALARM: GD-CO4-203 — CO 52 ppm, Battery 4 basement
events.detail: First uncleared single-sensor alarm of the sequence. Crew advised to complete current task step and reassess.

events.title: Radio log: GD-CO4-204 now rising
events.detail: Second basement CO channel trending up — no longer explainable as single-sensor drift.

events.title: ALARM: PT-GM-104 — 9.85 kPa HIGH
events.detail: Gas main pressure above high limit at Battery 4 riser.

events.title: HIGH ALARM: GD-CO4-203 — CO 118 ppm
events.detail: Basement chamber CO above high-high limit. Evacuation of confined space ordered.

events.title: ⬛ INCIDENT MARKER — 10:30
events.detail: In the recorded composite event: gas ignition in the inspection chamber area during attempted egress. [Synthetic replay marker — this is where the timeline you are watching ended in reality.]

events.title: Replay complete
events.detail: Switch to the KAVACH view to see the compound-risk detection timeline and counterfactual intervention sequence.

hazard_windows.label: Occupied confined space with rising CO and gas-main overpressure on connected riser

contributing_factors: Sub-threshold gas-main pressure drift from 02:30 (regulator PR-104 passing)
Transient pressure excursions acknowledged without trend review (04:25, 04:55)
Incomplete shift handover at 06:00 — drift not communicated
Single-point gas test for confined space entry (chamber rear untested)
Confined space entry without gas-main isolation at 06:30
Hot work permit issued 20 m from basement vent shaft at 08:30
Valve V-707 throttling at 09:30 accelerating back-pressure
